focus: Ghana tax-benefit surface: national income tax (PAYE and self-assessment), personal reliefs, social contributions, and cash-transfer / social-protection programmes.
purpose: Household-level comparison-oracle and supporting-source references for Ghana Axiom coverage. None of these are legal authority.
oracle_scope: A RuleSpec oracle must be an executable, pinned external calculator that accepts household-level inputs and returns household-level tax-benefit outputs comparable to Axiom outputs. Aggregate simulators, distributional reports, parameter documentation, and public model summaries are supporting references only, not oracles.

oracles.name: GHAMOD
oracles.role: Intended household-level tax-benefit comparison oracle for Ghana. GHAMOD is the SOUTHMOD tax-benefit microsimulation model for Ghana (UNU-WIDER, in collaboration with the University of Ghana, the Ghana Statistical Service, and the Ministry of Finance / GRA). Built on the EUROMOD platform.

availability_check.blocker: GHAMOD model-and-data bundle (model .xml plus SOUTHMOD/GHAMOD input microdata) is distributed by UNU-WIDER under a licensed-access programme. The bundle must clear UNU-WIDER SOUTHMOD access/licensing terms for use as a pinned comparison surface before it can be wired here. Until then, oracle parity tests are deferred and this repo encodes source-first from Act 896 and GRA/LEAP documentation.
